ogTitle: Fowlers Bay vs Frahns: Climate Safety

heading: Fowlers Bay vs Frahns — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fowlers Bay, South Australia and Frahns, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Frahns has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Fowlers Bay (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fowlers Bay or Frahns safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fowlers Bay has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Frahns scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fowlers Bay scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Frahns scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fowlers Bay or Frahns?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Frahns has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
